name: Sour Cream Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine until smooth.
2. Gradually add the sour cream, mixing well after each addition.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the sugar, flour, and soda.
4. Add the flour mixture to the margarine mixture, alternately with the eggs, incorporating 1/2 cup at a time. Finish by adding the remaining egg.
5. Mix in the vanilla extract and lemon extract after each addition of flour.
6. Stir in the coconut if using.
7. Pour the batter into a greased 10-inch tube pan.
8. Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 1 hour and 45 minutes to 2 hours, or until set.
End of Recipe
